case_title: ADAM JEFFREY HALL VS. AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HALL, ADAM JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
